identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a data entry dashboard that feels like a modern fintech product, not a spreadsheet.
principles: Fusion: Finance precision meets Pop Art vibrancy.
Emotion: Data entry should feel rewarding, not tedious.
Clarity: High contrast for data, soft backgrounds for structure.
Asymmetry: Use bento grids to break visual monotony.

theme.name: Vibrant Utility
theme.description: A clean, white-dominant interface with explosive bursts of color for functional differentiation (Cash vs Bank vs Credit).

rules: Never use pure white (#FFFFFF) for the main background. Use #F8FAFC (Slate 50).
Use specific colors for transaction types: Green for Cash, Blue for Bank, Orange for Credit.
Gradients are allowed ONLY on 'Total Sales' cards or active states, never on text.

headings.usage: All page titles, card headers, and major metrics.
headings.rule: Tight tracking (-0.02em) for a modern look.

body.rule: Tabular nums feature enabled for all data tables.

structure.dashboard: Grid with 12 columns. Summary cards span 3 or 4 cols. Main chart spans 8 cols. Recent activity spans 4 cols.
structure.forms: Max-width 2xl. Two-column grid for inputs on desktop, single column on mobile.
structure.tables: Full width, card-contained, with sticky headers.

cards.style: Flat white background, 1px border (slate-200), subtle shadow-sm.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 rounded-full px-6
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-full px-6

inputs.style: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-lg h-11

navigation.sidebar: Fixed left, bg-white border-r border-slate-200. Active item: bg-primary/10 text-primary font-medium.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80 for sticky headers and modal overlays.
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: All buttons and cards must have active scale (0.98) and hover lift.
visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle noise texture on the login page background to reduce flatness.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React. Stroke width 2px for clarity.

login_background.usage: Full screen background for Login/Register pages with a glassmorphism card overlay.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA. Use Slate-600+ for placeholder text, not lighter.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
2. SETUP THEME: Update tailwind.config.js with the specific colors defined in 'colors.palette'.
3. CREATE LAYOUT: Build a 'DashboardLayout' component with a sidebar and topbar.
4. BUILD COMPONENTS: Customize Shadcn UI components (Card, Button, Input) to match the 'components' rules.
5. IMPLEMENT PAGES: Start with the Dashboard (Bento Grid) and then the Sales Entry forms.
6. USE IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs for the login page and welcome sections.
7. DATA ENTRY: For the 'Sales Entry' page, use a clear distinction between 'Cash', 'Bank', and 'Credit' using the defined color codes.
8. DO NOT use generic 'Inter' font. Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Public Sans' for body.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
